- **AI Tutor**: Full chat (11 modes), proactive message generator, but timer-based (no event-driven architecture)
- **Storage**: 33-table IndexedDB + localStorage. 4 parallel settings systems detected — consolidation needed
- **Events**: Zero analytics/event tracking. Only 3 CustomEvents exist (vocabulary-changed, settings-updated, toggle-chat)
- **Learning Engine**: Ready-to-use analytics, weakness detection, SM-2 scheduler for context building

- **Proactive infra**: Partial — `ProactiveEventBus`, `ProactiveMessageService`, 20 message generators, cooldown logic, settings UI all exist but are not event-driven and have duplicate implementations between `apps/web` and `packages/ai-tutor`
- **Gaps**: No typed event model, no event repository, no rule engine decision layer, no time-based checks on app open/focus, default `enabled: true` needs to change to `false`
- **Extension**: MV3 with 13 message handlers, 18 popup components, proactive message panel, bridge to web app via postMessage
